content.description: Prose to write. Read verbatim into future prompts.

key.description: Agent-chosen semantic key, unique per team; re-using a key overwrites the entry in place. Key off the *stable identity* of what you're tracking — never embed a date, timestamp, or run id (that mints a new row every run and breaks dedupe). For run state/cursors, use one fixed key and keep the timestamp in `content`.

projectId.description: Override the active project for this single call only. Does not change the active project — use switch-project for a persistent change. Defaults to the active project when omitted. Must be a project the API key can access, or the call returns a permission error.

run_id.description: Run that authored this memory; persisted as `created_by_run_id` for lineage. Best-effort — a `run_id` that isn't a run on this project is dropped (lineage left null), not rejected, so the memory write is never lost.
